mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO im_message_receipt (message_id, conversation_id, user_id, receipt_type, receipt_at) VALUES (#{messageId}, #{conversationId}, #{userId}, #{receiptType}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT gm.user_id AS userId, COALESCE(NULLIF(gm.nick_name, ''), u.nickname) AS nickname, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, CASE WHEN r.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS readStatus, r.receipt_at AS readAt FROM im_group_member gm JOIN im_user u ON u.id = gm.user_id LEFT JOIN im_message_receipt r ON r.message_id = #{messageId} AND r.user_id = gm.user_id AND r.receipt_type = 2 WHERE gm.group_id = #{groupId} AND gm.status = 1 AND gm.user_id != #{excludeUserId} ORDER BY readStatus DESC, r.receipt_at ASC, gm.id ASC
